name: Rates.gamma_mean

args.name: n
args.description: The number of equal-probability Gamma categories

args.name: alpha
args.description: The shape parameter for the Gamma distribution

title: The conditional-mean Gamma rate heterogeneity model
description: This model divides a unit-mean Gamma distribution into equal-probability categories and represents each category by its conditional mean.

citation.title: Maximum likelihood phylogenetic estimation from DNA sequences with variable rates over sites: approximate methods
